channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Alaska Elections Director Disqualifies Senate Candidate Named Dan Sullivan Over Alleged Voter Confusion Concerns
item.description: An Alaska election official has formally disqualified a U.S. Senate candidate named Dan Sullivan who had filed to run against incumbent Republican Senator Dan Sullivan. The decision was issued by Alas...

item.title: Ruet-e-Hilal Committee Announces Muharram to Begin on June 17, Ashura on June 26
item.description: The Central Ruet-e-Hilal Committee of Pakistan has announced that the crescent moon marking the beginning of Muharram was not sighted anywhere in the country on June 15, 2026. Following a meeting held...

item.title: Preservation Groups Sue Trump Administration Over Proposed National Garden of American Heroes at West Potomac Park
item.description: Several preservation and advocacy groups have filed a lawsuit challenging the Trump administration's plan to redevelop West Potomac Park in Washington, D.C., into a new National Garden of American Her...

item.title: Egypt Takes a 1-0 Lead Over Belgium at Half-Time in FIFA World Cup 2026 Group G Match
item.description: Egypt made a strong start to its FIFA World Cup 2026 Group G campaign by taking a surprising 1-0 lead against Belgium at half-time in Seattle. Belgium, appearing in its 15th FIFA World Cup finals, ent...

item.title: Ceasefire Between Iran and the U.S. Faces Uncertainty as Israel Rejects Key Conditions
item.description: The article discusses concerns surrounding a recently announced 60-day ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran that was welcomed by President Donald Trump. Trump publicly celebrated the...

item.title: Commentators Question Trump's Appearance and Energy During G7 Summit Trip to France
item.description: A Raw Story report highlights reactions from political commentators, journalists, and social media users regarding President Donald Trump's appearance during the 2026 G7 Summit in Évian-les-Bains, Fra...

item.title: Report Says Trump Administration Discussed Suspending Habeas Corpus Protections for Undocumented Migrants
item.description: A report published by The New York Times and summarized by Raw Story states that senior officials in President Donald Trump’s administration seriously discussed the possibility of suspending habeas co...

item.title: A Look Back at Courteney Cox’s Rise to Fame Through Rare Photos from the 1980s
item.description: The article revisits Courteney Cox’s early career during the 1980s, highlighting the key milestones that transformed her from a college student into a recognizable television and film actress. One of ...

item.title: Parliamentary Education Committee Launches Inquiry Into Causes of School Fires and Unrest Across Kenya
item.description: The National Assembly Departmental Committee on Education has announced a comprehensive inquiry into the increasing number of school fires, destruction of property and student unrest reported in learn...

item.title: Journalist Ken Klippenstein Criticizes New Trump-Era Military Recruitment Ad for Its Emphasis on Military Power and Awe
item.description: A new U.S. military recruitment advertisement unveiled during a White House UFC event has sparked criticism from investigative journalist Ken Klippenstein, who argues that the video conveys a deeper i...

item.title: Saskatchewan government pledges improvements after report finds major gaps in 2025 wildfire preparedness and response
item.description: Saskatchewan Premier Scott Moe has acknowledged significant shortcomings in the province’s handling of the 2025 wildfire season following the release of an independent report by accounting firm MNP. T...

item.title: Dave Portnoy urges Trump to condemn UFC fighter’s controversial remark about Michelle Obama at White House event
item.description: Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy publicly called on President Donald Trump to condemn a UFC fighter’s controversial comments about former First Lady Michelle Obama. The incident occurred during a ...

item.title: Los Angeles Piñata Makers See Surge in Demand for ICE Agent and Trump-Themed Piñatas Amid Immigration Enforcement
item.description: In Los Angeles' Piñata District, local businesses are experiencing increased demand for custom piñatas depicting ICE agents and former President Donald Trump. According to a report from LA Material, t...

item.title: Trump Announces US-Iran Peace Agreement as Questions Remain Over Its Durability
item.description: This episode of The Guardian's Full Story podcast examines the announcement of a peace agreement between the United States and Iran, more than four months after the beginning of Operation Epic Fury. T...

item.title: 12-year-old charged after stolen vehicle injures Toronto police officer in hit-and-run incident
item.description: A 12-year-old boy has been charged with attempted murder following a serious hit-and-run incident involving a stolen vehicle and a Toronto police officer in the early hours of Monday morning. Accordin...

item.title: Report alleges Jeffrey Epstein bribed jail deputy for preferential treatment during Palm Beach detention
item.description: A congressional testimony has raised new allegations regarding Jeffrey Epstein’s conduct while he was detained in the Palm Beach County Stockade between 2008 and 2009. According to former assistant Sa...

item.title: Audio of Jonathan Andic's emergency call released as investigation into Mango founder Isak Andic's death continues
item.description: A recording of the emergency call made by Jonathan Andic following the death of his father, Mango founder Isak Andic, has been broadcast by a Catalan radio station. In the call, Jonathan can be heard ...

item.title: Thordur Palsson Confirmed as Director of the Dead by Daylight Film Adaptation
item.description: Behaviour Interactive and Blumhouse have officially announced that Icelandic filmmaker Thordur Palsson will direct the upcoming live-action adaptation of Dead by Daylight. The announcement was made du...

item.title: Tony Burke comments on migration and housing supply spark political debate
item.description: The article examines Home Affairs Minister Tony Burke’s recent comments on immigration and housing supply, made during an appearance on Sky News ahead of the release of Australia’s net overseas migrat...

item.title: Critics Question Proposed $300 Billion Reconstruction Fund Included in Iran Agreement
item.description: A wave of online criticism followed comments by U.S. Vice President JD Vance regarding a proposed Iran agreement that could allow Iran access to a reconstruction fund worth up to $300 billion. During ...
